label: HTTP service
description: Send an HTTP request to any URL — the full event or a templated body — with optional HMAC signing.

fields.label: Body template (optional)
fields.hint: Sent for non-GET requests; defaults to the full trigger event as JSON. {{variable}}, {{value}}, {{event}} are interpolated.

fields.label: Signing secret (optional)
fields.hint: Adds an X-Nodrix-Signature HMAC-SHA256 header over the request body so the receiver can verify it.
